items.name: Gazpacho
items.description: A refreshing chilled soup with all the flavors of summer. Garnish with a drizzle of extra virgin olive oil and your favorite fresh herbs.

items.name: Chickpea Masala NEW!
items.description: Lush, tangy and warmly spiced with garam masala, this soup echos the aromatic flavors of buttery chicken but without the cream, butter or chicken!   Ingredients: Filtered water, Chickpeas*, Onions*, Cauliflower*, Coconut Milk*, Tomato Paste*, Olive Oil, Garlic, Ginger*, Garam Masala*, Coriander*, Paprika*, Sea Salt, Cumin*  *ORGANIC

items.name: Zucchini Basil
items.description: A summer seasonal soup with farm fresh zucchini and basil, pureed smooth.  Enjoy hot or cold!

items.name: Cuban Black Bean
items.description: Seasonal bell peppers, onions, garlic and spices create a hearty and flavorful bean soup. Garnish with sour cream or yogurt, sliced avocado or salsa.

items.name: Beautiful Beet
items.description: Tangy beets, cabbage and a unique spice mix blended silky smooth.    INGREDIENTS: Filtered Water, Red Beets*, Cabbage* Onions*, Celery*, Garlic, Olive Oil, Filtered Water, Lemon Juice*, Sea Salt, Cumin*, Coriander* Caraway Seeds*, Star Anise*, Red Pepper Flakes*  ORGANIC **Organic or Organic Equivalent

items.name: Arugula Leek & Yam
items.description: Our version of a vegan leek and potato using white yams/sweet potatoes, leeks and arugula.  INGREDIENTS: Filtered Water, White Yams*, Leeks*, Onions*, White Wine, Arugula*, Olive Oil, Lemon Juice*, Sea Salt, Black Pepper* *ORGANIC

items.name: Carrot Coriander
items.description: A light puree of carrots and and warm coriander spice. Garnish with fresh cilantro or lime juice.

items.name: Borscht
items.description: For beet lovers only! A deliciously satisfying combination of grated beets, cabbage, carrots and onions, soured with tart red wine vinegar and lemon juice.  Serve warm or cold with a dollop of sour cream or yogurt and fresh dill.

items.name: Caraway Cauliflower
items.description: Cauliflower, toasted caraway seed and mustard give this soup its unique flavor and creamy texture.

items.name: Carrot Ginger
items.description: Probably our most popular soup! Fresh ginger and lemon add tangy zest to this simple puree of carrots and sweet potatoes. No salt added!

items.name: Creamy Mushroom
items.description: Pureed cauliflower gives this soup its creamy texture. A delicious and healthy alternative to a traditional creamy mushroom.    Ingredients: Filtered Water, Cauliflower*, Onions*, White Mushrooms*, Olive Oil, Marsala Wine, Dried Shiitake Mushrooms*, Garlic, Ground Mustard Seed*, Thyme*, Sea Salt, Black Pepper*  *ORGANIC
items.ingredientsText: Filtered Water, Cauliflower*, Onions*, White Mushrooms*, Olive Oil, Marsala Wine, Dried Shiitake Mushrooms*, Garlic, Ground Mustard Seed*, Thyme*, Sea Salt, Black Pepper*  *ORGANIC

items.name: Curry Lentil
items.description: A thick, hearty soup with the sweet and tangy flavors of curry and lemon.

items.name: Fennel & Bean
items.description: Made with fresh fennel, navy beans, garlic, onion, carrots, roasted anise seed, thyme and a splash of white wine and lemon.   Ingredients: Filtered water, navy beans*, fennel*, onions*, carrots*, white wine, lemon juice*, olive oil, garlic, anise seed*, sea salt, black pepper*, thyme* *Organic

items.name: French Lentil
items.description: A hearty mix of French lentils, tomatoes, herbs and a touch of smoked paprika.

items.name: Green Goodness
items.description: Ingredients: Filtered Water, Cauliflower*, Onions*, Garlic*, Arugula*, Spinach* and/or Kale* Turmeric*, Nutmeg*, All Spice*, Sea Salt, Black Pepper*  *ORGANIC

items.name: Harissa Red Lentil
items.description: Sweet vegetables, red lentils and spicy Harissa flavors are blended together in this warm and satisfying soup.

items.name: Italian Vegetable
items.description: This classic vegetable soup is full of nourishing root vegetables, squash, potatoes, tomatoes and greens and seasoned with basil and oregano.

items.name: Masala Split Pea
items.description: Hearty split peas and garam masala spice create comfort and warmth, a perfect antidote to a dreary day.

items.name: Minestrone
items.description: A soup for all seasons, loaded with fresh and healthy seasonal vegetables and hearty beans. Garnish with fresh basil and parmesan cheese.

items.name: Mushroom Buckwheat
items.description: Our version of Mushroom Barley but we use gluten free roasted buckwheat (kasha) instead of barley. Filtered Water, Buckwheat*, Mushrooms, Onions*, Carrots*, Celery*, Olive Oil, Lemon Juice*, Shiitake Mushrooms*, Thyme*, Fennel Seed*,  Sea Salt*, Black Pepper*  *ORGANIC

items.name: Red Lentil Dal
items.description: Featuring Panch Phoran, a magical blend of whole seeds -- fennel, mustard, fenugreek, cumin and nigella. We temper the seeds in hot olive oil to release their magical flavors, then add red lentils, tomatoes, onions, garlic and ginger.   Ingredients: Filtered Water, Red Lentils*, Onions*, Tomatoes*, Olive Oil, Garlic, Ginger* Panch Phoran (Cumin Seed*, Fennel Seed*, Nigella Seed*, Fenugreek Seed*, Mustard Seed*) Sea Salt, Black Pepper* * ORGANIC

items.name: Chicken Schmaltz
items.description: Rendered from Pastured Chicken, Onions*, Carrots*, Celery*, Apple Cider Vinegar*, Thyme*, Peppercorns*, Bay Leaves*  * ORGANIC (No salt added)

items.name: Beef Tallow
items.description: Rendered from 100% Grass Fed Beef, Filtered Water, Onions*, Carrots*, Celery*, Apple Cider Vinegar*, Garlic, Thyme*, Black Peppercorns*, Bay Leaves* *ORGANIC

items.name: Curry Pumpkin Low FODMAP
items.description: Low FODMAP. Made without garlic and onions. A savory sweet blend of curry blended with Kabocha squash (also known as Japanese Pumpkin) or Acorn Squash and a touch of creamy coconut milk.      INGREDIENTS: Filtered Water, Acorn* or Kabocha Squash*, Carrots*, Coconut Milk* (Water, Coconut*), Lemon or Lime Juice*, Olive Oil, Ginger Root*, Curry Powder*, Sea Salt, Pepper* *ORGANIC
items.ingredientsText: Filtered Water, Acorn* or Kabocha Squash*, Carrots*, Coconut Milk* (Water, Coconut*), Lemon or Lime Juice*, Olive Oil, Ginger Root*, Curry Powder*, Sea Salt, Pepper* *ORGANIC
